programme.title: Super Bowl Classics
programme.sub-title: XXXIV: St. Louis Rams vs. Tennessee Titans
programme.desc: St. Louis Rams linebacker Mike Jones makes a game-saving tackle on the 1-yard line as time expires, preserving the Rams' first-ever Super Bowl title. From Jan. 30, 2000 at the Georgia Dome in Atlanta.

programme.title: A Football Life

programme.title: Golf's Greatest Holes
programme.desc: Paul and Chris play the 14th hole in Aroeira near Lisbon, Portugal, a course that Paul knows well from playing the Portuguese Open.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Golf legend Annika Sorenstam shares her process for ball striking, from setup to in-swing fundamentals. Also, Annika demonstrates how to hit the driver longer or straighter based on the situation.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Keep up with everything that's happening in the world of golf. The game's only live, daily news source provides more than just scores, delivering in depth analysis, breaking news, and unforgettable highlights.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Keep up with everything that's happening in the world of golf. The game's only live, daily news source provides more than just scores, delivering in depth analysis, breaking news, and unforgettable highlights.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Keep up with everything that's happening in the world of golf. The game's only live, daily news source provides more than just scores, delivering in depth analysis, breaking news, and unforgettable highlights.

programme.title: Rory x Operation 36
programme.desc: Lauren Thompson and Rory McIlroy are joined by Maya Gaudin, a Drive, Chip and Putt champion, to try out Level one and provide a few tips for pitch shots in the process.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal are back on the range teaching how to get off to a solid start this golf season; ball striking tips used by greats; Hall reveals how two empty sleeves of golf balls can improve ball striking.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach a variety of shots from the sand, including how to hit green-side bunker shots. Martin also shares fairway bunker tips he learned from Rory McIlroy, and Tom Watson shares his advice for dealing with plugged lies.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal show which setup, swing, and equipment adjustments translate into driving the ball longer and straighter. Martin shares driving tips from Dustin Johnson and discusses how to find the proper driver shaft length.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal share chipping tips from 10 Masters champions including Tiger Woods, Gary Player, Phil Mickelson, and Nick Faldo; how to scramble from just off the green, hit long-running chips, and make crisp contact from tight lies.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: The importance of the follow through with drills on improving the swing post-impact; Ben Hogan's picture frame finish stops the hook; Henrik Stenson stops the slice; how arm wrestling can improve the golf swing.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal show which setup, swing, and equipment adjustments translate into stopping slices and hooks. Martin shares some of his favorite drills on finding the proper grip, maintaining balance, and swinging on the proper plane.

programme.title: Ask Rory
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy explains common amateur mistakes when trying to add distance and his par 5 strategy when going for the green in two.

programme.title: Ask Rory
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy answers member-submitted questions about how to swing better, shoot lower scores and have more fun with challenges on the golf course.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide: Playing in the Wind
programme.sub-title: Playing Downwind and Into the Wind
programme.desc: Nick Dougherty breaks down the art of playing downwind and into the wind. Nick will guide you through techniques to maximize distance, control trajectory, and adjust your club selection to take full advantage of the wind.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide: Playing in the Wind
programme.sub-title: Right to Left Left to Right
programme.desc: Nick Dougherty teaches techniques and tips for achieving excellent golf performance when playing into the wind. He shows how to maximize distance, control trajectory, and adjust club selection to make the most of the weather conditions.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach the best wedge tips for around the green. Learn how to set up for success, use tees to improve contact, and how to control distance like Dustin Johnson with the use of a clock.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach the shots needed for success in The Masters; Martin shares a driving tip he learned playing golf with Dustin Johnson and a distance drill used by Jack Nicklaus; a top college player gives a guest lesson.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall explains how to become a better putter ASAP; those four letters standing for aim, stability, arc, and pace. Martin shares drills for each letter from putting gurus including Dave Stockton, Phil Kenyon, and the late Frank Thomas.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: 18-time Major Champion Jack Nicklaus speaks with Martin Hall about being coached at an early age by Jack Grout, his number one swing fundamental, and how to maximize distance with the driver. Favorite drills inspired by The Golden Bear.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal demonstrate how to improve on tempo and rhythm. Martin discusses the difference between the two and shares tips used by Hall of Famers such as Tom Watson, Ernie Els, Vijay Singh, and Nick Faldo.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach the shots needed for success in the U.S. Open. Jack Nicklaus joins for an exclusive interview and shares the ball striking skill that helped him become a 4-time U.S. Open champion.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach the shots needed for success in the U.S. Open. Jack Nicklaus joins for an exclusive interview and shares the ball striking skill that helped him become a 4-time U.S. Open champion.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Two-time major champion Zach Johnson showcases his very best iron and driver instruction and offers advice on how to improve your wedge play by working on a consistent ball flight and trajectory.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Zach Johnson showcases his very best chipping, pitching and bunker play by offering advice on how to improve your play from the most basic of chip shots to the hardest flop shots. Zach highlights ways to enhance your short game consistency.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Zach Johnson showcase his best putting instruction by offering advice on how to improve you play.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Mark O'Meara talks his approach to pitching and chipping that can shave strokes off your game.

programme.title: The Swing Gym
programme.desc: World-renowned fitness coach Don Saladino is joined by Paige Mackenzie and Devan Bonebrake to teach exercises that will build a better backswing, improve transition and help stick the finish.

programme.title: The Swing Gym
programme.desc: Fix bothersome swing flaws with specific exercises that Don Saladino designed for golfers.

programme.title: The Swing Gym
programme.desc: World-renowned fitness coach Don Saladino is joined by Paige Mackenzie and Devan Bonebrake to teach exercises that will stop the slice, increase distance and help maintain balance throughout the swing.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Keep up with everything that's happening in the world of golf. The game's only live, daily news source provides more than just scores, delivering in depth analysis, breaking news, and unforgettable highlights.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Keep up with everything that's happening in the world of golf. The game's only live, daily news source provides more than just scores, delivering in depth analysis, breaking news, and unforgettable highlights.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Keep up with everything that's happening in the world of golf. The game's only live, daily news source provides more than just scores, delivering in depth analysis, breaking news, and unforgettable highlights.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.sub-title: How the Trail Arm Works With Justin Bruton
programme.desc: Justin Bruton, working with Chris Como, details how the trail arm functions in the swing, focusing on its connection to the body, wrist hinge and rotation to deliver power and control at impact, helping golfers avoid common mishits.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: Chris Como visits with Terry Rowles and reveals how he teaches the golf swing based on specific body types. Terry demonstrates how the proper grip and backswing are decided based upon an individual's body measurements.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: Chris Como visits PGA National Golf Club and shows how his student, Jamie Lovemark, has come back from multiple injuries and swing changes. Jamie also demonstrates workouts that can help prevent future injuries.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: Chris Como travels the country and learns from the best players and coaches in golf. Como shares the best tips and drills from coaches Jim McLean, Boyd Summerhays, Andrew Getson and many more.
